2606.09603.title: Automated IEP Generation from Traditional Chinese Parent-Teacher Interviews via Corpus-Grounded Feature Diffusion
2606.09603.paper_summary: Writing Individualized Education Programs (IEPs) is a high-labor, knowledge-intensive document burden; English-language research has demonstrated that generative AI can significantly reduce drafting time, yet automated IEP generation in Traditional Chinese remains virtually unexplored due to domain data scarcity, strict privacy regulations, and the absence of local evaluation benchmarks. We propose a low-resource fine-tuning pipeline centered on Corpus-Grounded Feature Diffusion (CGFD): (1) 25 dual-expert high-score seed transcripts are selected via a tau threshold with flag-aware score caps; (2) a FeatureProfile (sentence length, structure, quantification templates) is extracted from seeds and injected into LLM prompts alongside Verbalized-Sampling-style diversity control to drive diffusion; (3) 15 expert gold seeds are used as diffusion anchors, targeting 585 samples; 567 valid diffusion samples are obtained, yielding a 582-sample training set used to fine-tune Breeze-7B with QLoRA; (4) schema-constrained inference via Grammar-Constrained Decoding (GCD) enforces a hierarchical SMART Goal Ladder schema at inference time. Ablation results on a 55-sample schema stress set reveal an unexpected finding: GCD is counterproductive under Traditional Chinese token budgets -- the no-GCD path achieves 100% schema pass rate at 34% lower median latency, outperforming GCD on both reliability and speed. On the n=10 formal hold-out, the no-GCD inference path achieves BERTScore F1 = 0.779, exceeding GPT-5.4 (0.726), DeepSeek-V3.2 (0.703), Gemini-3-Flash-Preview (0.703), and Llama-4-Maverick (0.700) zero-shot baselines while maintaining fully local, air-gapped inference. This system addresses a gap in Traditional Chinese special-education NLP and offers a scalable, privacy-preserving local inference solution under an industrial engineering paradigm.
2606.09603.paper_summary_zh: 撰寫個別化教育計畫（IEPs）是一項高勞動、高知識密集的文檔負擔；英語研究已證明生成式人工智慧可以顯著減少草擬時間，但由於領域數據稀缺、嚴格的隱私法規和缺乏當地評估基準，傳統中文的自動IEP生成幾乎未被探索。我們提出了一個以語料庫為基礎的特徵擴散（CGFD）為中心的低資源微調管道： (1) 通過tau閾值和標記感知的分數上限選擇25個雙專家高分種子轉錄本； (2) 從種子中提取特徵檔案（句子長度、結構、量化模板），並將其注入LLM提示中，與口語化抽樣風格的多樣性控制一起推動擴散； (3) 使用15個專家金種子作為擴散錨點，目標為585個樣本；獲得567個有效擴散樣本，產生582個樣本的訓練集，用於使用QLoRA微調Breeze-7B； (4) 通過語法約束解碼（GCD）進行架構約束推理，在推理時強制執行一個分層的SMART目標梯度架構。對55個樣本架構壓力集的消融結果揭示了一個意外的發現：在傳統中文的標記預算下，GCD是適得其反的——無GCD路徑在34%較低的中位延遲下達到100%的架構通過率，並在可靠性和速度上超越GCD。在n=10的正式保留中，無GCD推理路徑達到BERTScore F1 = 0.779，超過GPT-5.4（0.726）、DeepSeek-V3.2（0.703）、Gemini-3-Flash-Preview（0.703）和Llama-4-Maverick（0.700）的零-shot基準，同時保持完全本地、隔離的推理。該系統填補了傳統中文特殊教育NLP的空白，並在工業工程範式下提供了一個可擴展的、保護隱私的本地推理解決方案。
2606.09603.author: Kuanlin Chen et.al.
